module.name: kbd
module.description: A keyboard key. The key label is the block body. Renders inline.
module.aiSpec: Render text as a physical keyboard key (e.g. Enter, Ctrl, Esc). The body (between the directive and @end) is the key label. Although it's a block module it renders inline, so it sits within a sentence. Use one per key; for a combo, place several side by side (e.g. Ctrl + C).

snippet.label: Keyboard Key
snippet.description: A single physical keyboard key. Body = the key label.
